ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 无 Intl 支持，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.source: [HIDER] bookmark data not found.
ast.target: [HIDER] 未找到书签数据。

ast.target: [HIDER] 书签名称为空

ast.name: log
ast.source: initialized
ast.target: 已初始化

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Snippets
ast.target: 代码片段

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 似乎加载的翻译是扁平 JSON 格式，而不是嵌套格式。请在初始化时设置 keySeparator: false，或确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: you are still using the legacy format function, please use the new approach: https://www.i18next.com/translation-function/formatting
ast.target: init: 您仍在使用旧版格式函数，请使用新方法：https://www.i18next.com/translation-function/formatting

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init: 未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init: i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用 init 一次！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next was not initialized
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next 未初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages were undefined or empty
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages 未定义或为空

ast.name: cls
ast.source: menu-separator explorer-hider
ast.target: menu-separator explorer-hider

ast.name: desc
ast.source: {{- pluginLink}} adding a {{- datapath}} attribute to {{- treeInner}}, doubles all the rules to take it into account (only for roots folders).
ast.target: {{- pluginLink}} 为 {{- treeInner}} 添加 {{- datapath}} 属性，会将所有规则加倍以考虑此情况（仅适用于根文件夹）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically hide the excluded files from Obsidian Settings
ast.target: 自动隐藏来自 Obsidian 设置的排除文件

ast.name: desc
ast.source: {{- pluginLink}} ajoutant un attribut {{- datapath}} dans {{- treeInner}}, double toutes les règles pour le prendre en compte (seulement pour les dossiers à la racine).
ast.target: {{- pluginLink}} 添加了 {{- datapath}} 属性到 {{- treeInner}}，将所有规则加倍以考虑此属性（仅适用于根目录下的文件夹）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Cache automatiquement les fichiers exclus depuis les paramètres d'Obsidian
ast.target: 自动隐藏在 Obsidian 设置中排除的文件
